nasb.text: Neither their silver nor their gold Will be able to deliver them On the day of the Lord’s wrath; And all the earth will be devoured In the fire of His jealousy, For He will make a complete end, Indeed a terrifying one, Of all the inhabitants of the earth.

esv.text: Neither their silver nor their gold shall be able to deliver them on the day of the wrath of the Lord. In the fire of his jealousy, all the earth shall be consumed; for a full and sudden end he will make of all the inhabitants of the earth.

cnv.text: 在耶和華發怒的日子， 他們的金銀也不能救他們， 全地都要被他的妒火吞滅； 因為他要徹底毀滅地上所有的居民， 真是可怕的毀滅。

ccb.text: 在耶和华发怒的日子， 他们的金银救不了他们。 祂的怒火必吞噬大地， 祂必骤然毁灭一切世人。”
